description: Deploys (or reuses) an Azure OpenAI PAYG account + model deployment for the SecurityInsight 'Primary' instance. Calls the Deploy_OpenAI_PAYG_Instance_SecurityInsights engine with this variant's pre-filled customer values.
author: Morten Knudsen <mok@mortenknudsen.net>
notes: One of N launcher variants for the Deploy_OpenAI engine. Edit launcher.override.ps1 (sibling) to swap any value at runtime without modifying the template.
